purpose: Verify the Safe-2025 NR4A3-selective indole-3-carbinol compounds at/near primary source for the anchor-warhead decision.

review_citation.note: Safe-group REVIEW (secondary source for the compounds).

disclaimer: Records only what the fetched review text states. Primary med-chem paper for the indole-3-carbinol series must still be fetched + read before adoption. No structures or selectivity magnitudes are asserted beyond what appears verbatim below.
